_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to use our senses and simple tools to watch carefully and write down what we see.

_source.w: We are learning to use our senses and simple tools to watch carefully and write down what we see.
y: Recording what we observe helps us remember and share our discoveries with others.
Using tools like magnifying glasses lets us see things our eyes alone might miss.
Good observation is a skill we use everywhere — noticing details helps us in all parts of life.
eg: Using a magnifying glass to look at the veins in a leaf.
Drawing a picture of a caterpillar and labelling its body parts.
Measuring how tall a sunflower has grown using a ruler.
Using our ears to count how many different bird calls we hear.
Recording the colour and shape of different shells we collected.
Taking photos of clouds and sorting them by shape.
